✉️ Compose & Send Pitch

💡 Tips for Good Email Deliverability

• Personalize the subject and first line — mention the curator's playlist by name

• Keep it short — curators get hundreds of emails, aim for 100-150 words max

• Include streaming links — Spotify/Apple Music links make it easy for curators to listen

• Don't sound desperate — professional tone, not "please please please add my song"

• Warm up new accounts — send 5-10/day for the first week before scaling up
